title: Family, in full colour
caption: National Cousins Day
copyright: Flock of American flamingos, Isabela Island, Galápagos Islands, Ecuador (© Tui De Roy/Nature Picture Library)
description: Today is National Cousins Day—a perfect excuse to reconnect with the people who know your family stories best and probably helped create a few of them. Fittingly, Canadians mark the day alongside their neighbour and, you could say, cousin to the south: the United States. Whether you grew up at the cottage, camping, skating or gathering for a long weekend barbecue, cousins often share some of life's best memories.
